name: Marlin

base_stats.notable: Highest Conquest Attack of any Gen 1-2 Legendary documented (3235 vs Saul 2697, Hilde 2664).

conquest.name: Tidal Rush
conquest.description: Marlin is a tidal force on the battlefield, unleashing a pulse dealing AOE damage and immobilizing enemies for 1.5 seconds.

conquest.name: Fermented Blow
conquest.description: Marlin's deadly airborne concoction deals AOE damage.

conquest.name: Lucky Hit
conquest.description: Good fortune inevitably follows bad. Marlin stuns targets for a brief duration after every N strikes.
conquest.complex_scaling_note: This skill has two scaling axes: the number of strikes needed to trigger (decreases with level) and the stun duration (increases with level).

expedition.name: Wild Card
expedition.description: Marlin, being unpredictable, has a chance to increase damage dealt by 50% for all squads.

expedition.name: Rumhead
expedition.description: Grants all squads a 20% chance on attack of reducing enemy squads' Lethality for 2 turns.

expedition.name: Dynamo
expedition.description: Grants squads' attacks a 50% chance of increasing damage dealt.

exclusive_gear_skills.name: Servant of Wine
exclusive_gear_skills.description: Marlin's special brew heals the weakest hero with each basic attack. Unlocked only when Mistweaver is equipped.

exclusive_gear_skills.name: Admiral of the Line
exclusive_gear_skills.description: A true admiral leads from the front. Increases Rally Squads' Lethality. Unlocked only when Mistweaver is equipped.

exclusive_gear.name: Mistweaver
exclusive_gear.notes: Highest exclusive-gear Attack bonus documented so far (+655 vs Saul's Rabbitgear Cannon +546).

order: Wild Card → Rumhead → Dynamo sequence for full triple-threat stacking
Tidal Rush early for Conquest damage

gear_recommendations.reasoning: Standard archer archetype at legendary tier. Derived from community gear build templates (allclash.com Zoe guide as canonical base for infantry, confirmed by community consensus across allclash, heaven-guardian, kingshothandbook build guides).
sources: allclash.com Zoe build guide (canonical infantry template)

lineup_inferences.note: Marlin for offense. Long-term F2P investment — aim for 465 shards to 4-star quickly.
Marlin remains core damage even in late game F2P compositions.

best_partners.theoretical_synergy: Marlin is the F2P archer carry — one of the few Legendary archers available without spending. His Rumhead debuff combines with any high-damage rally composition. His Servant of Wine heal makes him self-sustaining in long fights. Pairs especially well with front-line tanks (Jabel/Zoe) who let him stay safe.
best_partners.source: kingshotguides.com + lootbar.gg + kingshotmastery.com (community consensus lineup guides)

counters.reason: No public source documents explicit hero-vs-hero counter matchups for Kingshot. Community discussions reference troop-type rock-paper-scissors (Infantry > Cavalry > Archer > Infantry) and formation-based counters but not specific hero counters. Check Discord/Reddit for player-tested matchups.

f2p_investment.shard_cost_to_star_up: aim for 465 shards to reach 4-stars quickly (per heroes.js community note)
f2p_investment.reasoning: Marlin is a long-term F2P investment. Community guides recommend saving shards consistently to reach 4-stars. His kit scales into late game, making him worth the investment for F2P players who can wait.

rally.reasoning: Excellent ranged damage dealer. His high base Attack (3235) combined with AOE Conquest skills makes him a top rally option.

lore_background.title: The Captain Who Returned from the Misty Tides
lore_background.backstory: Marlin was one of the Four Great Captains, commander of nearly ten ships. Thirty years ago, he led his fleet into uncharted waters known as the Misty Tides — and disappeared. His flagship, the Santiago, later mysteriously reappeared with severe damage. When asked what happened, Marlin attributes the disaster to natural phenomena — magnetic fields, sea fog, shifting currents — and dismisses every supernatural explanation. Whether from conviction or denial, he refuses to speak of what he saw.
lore_background.personality_trait: skeptical, rational, haunted survivor, hard-drinking captain

deep_analysis: Marlin is the F2P archer carry of Kingshot — a Gen 2 Legendary with the highest base Conquest Attack (3235) of any documented hero so far. His kit is built around AOE damage and chance-based squad buffs. Conquest tree: Tidal Rush deals Attack × 280% AOE with a 1.5-second immobilize, Fermented Blow adds Attack × 70% AOE follow-up, and Lucky Hit grants periodic stuns after every 5 strikes at max level (stun duration up to 0.5 seconds). His Expedition tree is pure proc-chance RNG: Wild Card has up to a 40% chance to grant +50% damage to all squads, Rumhead has a 20% chance per attack to reduce enemy squads' Lethality by up to 50% for 2 turns, and Dynamo has a 50% chance to increase damage dealt by up to 50%. His exclusive gear Mistweaver adds +655 Attack (highest exclusive-gear Attack bonus documented), plus +60% Lethality and +60% Health, and unlocks two more skills: Servant of Wine (heals the weakest hero by up to 15% of his Attack per basic attack) and Admiral of the Line (+15% Rally Squads' Lethality). Community tier lists place him at S-tier Rally, B-tier Garrison and Bear Hunt. He's F2P-accessible through Hall of Heroes, Daily Deals, and Mythic General Hero Shard — community guides recommend saving 465 shards to reach 4-stars quickly. His lore: Captain of the Santiago, one of the Four Great Captains, vanished into the Misty Tides 30 years ago and came back with a ruined ship. He refuses to talk about what happened, attributing it all to natural phenomena. Whether out of conviction or denial, he keeps his ghosts at sea.
unverified_fields: shard_cost_to_star_up — approximate only (465 shards to 4-star from heroes.js, not from Marlin-specific source)

handbook_meta.description: Marlin dominates archer rally leadership from Gen 2 through Gen 4 with triple damage amplification. Wild Card and Dynamo create ~1.45x average damage with up to 2.25x burst potential. His offensive widget and highest Attack stat (3,235) among Gen 2 heroes make him the premier archer rally leader.
handbook_meta.top_skills_handbook_generic_names: Wild Card Rumhead Current Meta Heroes Tank Formation

effect_op_codes.description: Triple-threat archer widget rally leader — Wild Card/Rumhead/Dynamo for 2.25x burst
